rules: targetId meaning is scoped by eventId; never treat targetId as itemId globally.
Undocumented IDs must be preserved as IDs and resolved only when a matching resolver exists.
eventId 9800/9801/9802 targetId is a map id marker, not a stat amount to sum.
eventId 100 and 200 targetId resolves to ARC enemy or raider/player subject.
eventId 102 and 202 targetId resolves as weaponAssetId when weaponAssetId is not provided separately.
eventId 600 targetId resolves to crafted item id when present.

buried_city_jkv_employee_access_card.name: Buried City JKV Employee Access Card
